title: stelis tarantula
intro: Stelis tarantula, also known as Stelis elata, is a type of epiphytic orchid plant, which grows on other plants or trees for support. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Amazon region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis tarantula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
